productDisplayName: Chromozome Men Navy Blue Lounge Pants
description: Style NoteTailored from soft and stretchy single jersey knit cotton, this pair of lounge pants from chromozome is ideal for wearing when you're chilling out at home. Taping in white along the side takes this piece a notch higher on style. Its elasticated waistband with drawstring lets you customize the Fit. Pair it with your favourite comfy tee.  Product DetailsNavy blue lounge pants with an elasticated waistband and drawstring , two slit pockets at the side, embroidered branding on the left leg, white taping on either sides and printed branding on the inside for tag-less comfortMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size M
